resources.string: Enter API Key and URL to load models automatically
Too many parallel tasks may heat up or slow down the phone
Shell service is not running. Start ShadowAuto shell from the web launcher or ADB, then retry.
Use Meituan Waimai to order me a grande Starbucks vanilla latte
Keeping the controller available for automation tasks
On first launch, enter API Key, URL, and model, then test the connection.
Enter a goal on a task page and tap Run to start automation.
After starting, virtual screen casting, Stop, and progress logs will appear.
Tap + in the lower-right corner to add parallel tasks. Swipe left or right to switch tasks.
The top-right Stop button can stop all automation tasks at once.
Too many parallel tasks increase device load and may cause heat or lag.
Running multiple tasks may force-change clipboard contents, causing input failure or text mix-ups.
Automation opens apps on a virtual display. Do not tap the app icon being automated, and do not open that app from Recents, or the automation may fail.
Due to Android permission restrictions, some pages may appear black during screen casting, such as payment password pages.
Automation launches apps and injects taps on the virtual screen. Enter clear, specific task goals.
Before exiting the app, stop all tasks to avoid background automation continuing to run.
